description_long: This is a hospital-style bed with a metal frame, featuring raised side rails for safety and mobility. The bed is equipped with a thin mattress covered by a light blue sheet and a single pillow at the head. The frame includes both a headboard and a footboard, both constructed from tubular metal, and the bed sits on four caster wheels for easy movement. One side rail is partially lowered, indicating adjustability for patient access or care. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, typical of beds found in medical facilities or emergency shelters. The visible surfaces are smooth and clean, with a minimalist aesthetic and practical construction.
description: A hospital-style metal bed with side rails, caster wheels, and a light blue sheet and pillow. The design is utilitarian, with adjustable rails and a sturdy frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the footboard, raised side rails, and the end of the mattress with bedding neatly tucked.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, the partially lowered side rail, and the four caster wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the headboard, pillow, and the full width of the bed with both side rails visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side rail, the mattress, and the wheels, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
